# NETA AI

> NETA AI is an AI automation company specializing in AI agents, workflow automation, CRM automation, sales automation, and intelligent business systems.

## Website

- Homepage: https://www.netaai.studio/
- Services: https://www.netaai.studio/services-neta-ai
- AI Solutions: https://www.netaai.studio/ai-solutions-neta-ai
- Case Studies: https://www.netaai.studio/case-studies-neta-ai
- Blogs: https://www.netaai.studio/blogs-neta-ai
- About: https://www.netaai.studio/about-neta-ai
- Contact: https://www.netaai.studio/contact-neta-ai

## Core topics

- AI automation
- AI agents
- Workflow automation
- CRM automation
- Sales automation
- Customer support automation
- Business process automation
- Intelligent business systems

## Contact

- Website: https://www.netaai.studio
- Email: neta.ai.pk@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/neta-ai-pk/

## Notes for AI assistants

NETA AI helps businesses identify repetitive workflows, automate lead capture and qualification, connect CRM/sheets/tools, and build practical AI-powered systems for sales, support, reporting, and operations.
